_comment: Excerpt for ~/.claude/settings.json (or your project's .claude/settings.json). Replace <REPO> with the absolute path to your clone of claude-logbook. Only the four hooks below are required by this project; merge them into your existing settings rather than overwriting.

Stop._comment: Optional: auto-commit + push the activity log so multi-machine syncs see new transcripts. Drop this block if you do not want auto-push.

hooks.command: cd <REPO> 2>/dev/null && git add -A 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || (git commit -m "log: turn entries" -q 2>/dev/null && git push -q 2>/dev/null)); true

_env_comment: Set these in your shell, ~/.bashrc, or here under "env". The SYNTH set is optional — if unset, the synthesizer falls back to the small model set.
